name: flux-image
title: FLUX Image Generation
summary: Generate images with FLUX models (Black Forest Labs) via inference.sh CLI. Models: FLUX Dev LoRA, FLUX.2 Klein LoRA with custom style adaptation. Capabilities: text-to-image, image-to-image, LoRA fine-tuning, custom styles. Triggers: flux, flux.2, flux dev, flux schnell, flux pro, black forest labs, flux image, flux ai, flux model, flux lora
